name: audiencescore-pilot
title: AudienceScore Pilot — verified-review trust scores
description: Streamable HTTP MCP server for AudienceScore pilot reads. get_score returns an Ed25519-signed v0.2 rendering manifest for an offering-version; get_score_evidence returns the de-identified input needed to recompute it.

tools.name: get_score
tools.description: Get a signed pilot rendering v1 manifest for an offering-version.

arguments.offering: string, required — offering-version such as field-elevate-demo@v1
arguments.window_end: string, optional — RFC3339 rendering window end

tools.name: get_score_evidence
tools.description: Get de-identified rendering v1 input for independent recomputation.

arguments.offering: string, required — offering-version such as field-elevate-demo@v1
arguments.window_end: string, optional — RFC3339 rendering window end

note: Pilot deployment, pre-cryptographic-audit. With no verified reviews yet, scores remain below the k-anonymity floor and return published:false.
